/CAL: BEHAVIOR COURT/X: TO: THE SHERIFF OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO:/X: IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT DEFENDANT CRAIG HOLMAN HELD IN CUSTODYIN THE ABOVE LISTED CASE BE RELEASED FROM CUSTODY ON HIS OWN RECOGNIZANCE FOR THE PURPOSE OF TREATMENT DIRECTLY TO A REPRESENTATIVE FROM:CITYWIDE/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND ISORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD ANDBY THE SFSO/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONT/

/DAWT/X:COLLABORATIVE COURT ORDER, SIGNED BY JUDGE CROMPTON, IS FILED/X:ASA CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE (HD, HUMMINGBIRD) AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTHON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO; SUBMIT TO UA'S; NOT TO CONSUME ALCOHOL OR MARIJUANA/WEAP/CTORD: DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED AFTER A COORDINATED PICK-UP WITH SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS IS IN PLACE,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: BEHAVIOR COURT REPORT/DOP/
